plugin.name: Hello Pet Starter
plugin.description: A tiny starter plugin that adds one pet command and a configurable greeting.
config.greeting.label: Greeting
config.greeting.description: What your pet says when the command runs.
config.reactOnStart.label: Wave on start
config.reactOnStart.description: Make the pet wave when the plugin starts.
commands.sayHello.title: Say Hello
commands.sayHello.description: Ask your pet to say your configured greeting.
